docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,590.80 FILED BY NATHANS, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT WAGGONER, LESLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATHANS, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAGGONER, LESLIE $1,590.80 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
